description: Package config loads, stores, and provides sensible defaults for all YesMem configuration from a YAML file (config.yaml). It is loaded once at daemon/proxy startup by Load() and consumed throughout the application for LLM provider selection, extraction pipeline settings, proxy behavior, agent spawning, pricing, and paths. Key dependencies are gopkg.in/yaml.v3 for parsing, internal/embedding for vector-store config, and internal/models for profile types.
anti_patterns: → Prefer profile-specific PromptFlags (SharedPrompt, ClaudePrompt) over deprecated flat ProxyConfig prompt fields (PromptUngate, PromptRewrite, etc.)
→ Model ID resolution helpers (ModelID, NarrativeModelID, etc.) on Config add surface area — consider whether a standalone utility function in internal/models would be cleaner
